summary: A favorite recording of the show, generally hot in performance but marred by occasional flaws
review: The reviewer considers this the best available tape of the concert, noting that the performance is often exciting while suffering from some slip‑ups (“stnanks”). No specific technical details are given, but the overall tone suggests a solid recording despite minor issues.
